description: Style Note Taking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case with crystal embellishments Dial style: White dial with white hands Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: 3-faced multifunction display, branding on the dial and screw to reset time Water resistant Size Case diameter: 37 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
